name: CompTIA Network+
description: Vendor-neutral certification validating core networking competencies including troubleshooting, configuration, and network infrastructure management.

name: CompTIA Security+
description: Industry and government-recognized security certification covering threat analysis, incident response, digital forensics, and enterprise risk mitigation.

name: Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP)
description: Globally recognized advanced security certification validating expertise across security architecture, engineering, risk management, and governance frameworks.

name: Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
description: Hands-on, performance-based certification validating proficiency in Kubernetes cluster administration, container orchestration, and cloud-native infrastructure management.

name: Red Hat Certified Engineer (RHCE)
description: Advanced enterprise certification demonstrating expertise in infrastructure automation using Ansible and Terraform within Red Hat enterprise environments.

name: Offensive Security Certified Professional (OSCP)
description: Rigorous, hands-on penetration testing certification requiring demonstrated exploitation of live systems, validating practical offensive security and vulnerability assessment skills.
